config.note: Research-only single-factor FinLab benchmark for 95 strategy factor pool. Not a production selector.

tech_limit_up_streak_10.caveat: No per-symbol AlphaBuilders limit_fg/limo_fg; reconstructed with +/-9.5% and narrow range.

tech_limit_down_count_10.caveat: No per-symbol AlphaBuilders limit_fg/limo_fg; reconstructed with +/-9.5% and narrow range.

tech_locked_open_up_10.caveat: No per-symbol AlphaBuilders limit_fg/limo_fg; reconstructed with +/-9.5% and narrow range.

tech_locked_open_down_10.caveat: No per-symbol AlphaBuilders limit_fg/limo_fg; reconstructed with +/-9.5% and narrow range.

tech_disposal_active.caveat: FinLab dataset is a filter; active flag is approximated by inverse boolean.
